notes: Game starts minimised. Cursor usually doesn't work but is fixed by using the arrow keys to navigate through the options and setting the game to borderless windowed mode. On medium graphic settings the game averages between 50-60 fps. Has some small graphical issues but is playable to end without any crashes experienced.
title: Aporia: Beyond The Valley

notes: I didn't experience any of the problems described in older reports. Runs out of the box without any problems for me. ~55 average fps with everything maxed out at 3440x1440.
title: Aporia: Beyond The Valley

notes: couple of odd crashes, but I'm not convinced it was the game itself and not something in my OS going on. normally very stable and smooth under proton 4.11-2
title: Aporia: Beyond The Valley
